title: Extension crypto: WebCrypto X25519 + AES-256-GCM interop with daemon
description: Verify extension-side crypto produces keys and ciphertext compatible with daemon-side crypto. This is the critical cross-platform interop test.

steps.expected: CryptoKeyPair with extractable public key (32 bytes raw)

steps.action: Perform ECDH between daemon keypair and extension keypair (cross-platform)
steps.expected: Both sides derive identical 32-byte shared secret

steps.action: Derive session key on both sides with same PSK and public keys
steps.expected: Session keys are identical (verified by encrypting on one side, decrypting on other)

steps.action: Encrypt a message on daemon side, decrypt on extension side
Encrypt a message on extension side, decrypt on daemon side
Compute fingerprint on both sides for same public key
